title: [Nyessem, The Platforms]
description: A wide series of blue-green wooden platforms extends into the distance, over a dark and fog-shrouded pool that extends the length of the cavern.  A craggy formation covers the ceiling in a mix of ivory, amber, crimson, and violet crystals that jut sharply downward, as if pointing toward the pool.  A low thrum emanates from somewhere beneath the water, its source uncertain.
